chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Category in the business data model, identified by a unique CATEGORY_ID and described by a human-readable CATEGORY_NAME.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO | | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single, uniquely identifiable entry on a sales order that references exactly one product, specifies the quantity ordered and the unit price at the time of order, and contributes to the extended amount.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | **Examples**:
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Header
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order Header is the primary record for a customer order, uniquely identified by ORDER_ID, and includes the order date (ORDER_DATE) and a link to the customer.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SALES ORDER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line on a Sales Order that specifies a product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES ORDER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered | ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | ORDER LINE ITEM
──────────────────────────────────────────

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment is a financial transaction record tied to a Sales Order, including its unique Payment ID, method, amount, confirmation timestamp, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique numeric product identifier serving as the primary key for the product entity.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is a delivery record representing the dispatch of goods for a Sales Order, including identifiers, source/destination, shipped timestamp, tracking number, and status (e.g., PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer Address is the address used for delivering shipments to a customer.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login) | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
*

entities_post_resolution.name: User Email Address (Login)
entities_post_resolution.definition: The user's email address that uniquely identifies and authenticates the customer for login in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy is a policy that allows customers to return products within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: A numeric field representing the price per unit of a product, expressed in euros (EUR).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status | ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Business Rules**:
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Exactly One Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order line item in a sales transaction that references exactly one Product and records the quantity ordered.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status
- Belongs to exactly one Category | SALES ORDER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated | ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition:
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

- Geographic region for tax calculation

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment Amount
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer details including identity, contact information, regional segmentation, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products including identifiers, naming, category linkage, pricing, and availability status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores category information for products, including a hierarchical relationship to a parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header-level information for sales orders, including the customer, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery time, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores details of individual items included in customer orders, including the product, quantity, pricing, and line total.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores payments associated with customer orders, including how the payment was made, the amount, status, and timestamps for when the payment was confirmed and created.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about shipments linked to orders, including where the shipment originates, when it was shipped, the tracking reference, and current shipment status.
